    "Missing box extension on deep finish, leaving the box recessed too far behind the finished surface."

    "Install an approved box extension ring to bring the box edge flush with or within the permitted tolerance of the finished surface."

  "rationale": "The box is recessed too deeply behind the finished surface without an extension, violating standard installation requirements which dictate that boxes must be flush with or extend to the finished surface in non-combustible/combustible finishes to prevent exposed combustible material and ensure proper device mounting.",
